articles.title: National cannabis lobby group suspends operations, citing black market
articles.description: HALIFAX — A national cannabis lobby group says it’s suspending its operations, citing the financial challenges to the industry from the illicit market. In a news release Monday, the Cannabis Council of Canada suggested its members don’t have enough money to pay for its lobbying services.
